name: Fundera
description: Fundera by NerdWallet is a small business financial guidance and lending marketplace platform that helps small business owners compare and access loan products, business credit cards, checking accounts, and financial health tools. Fundera connects borrowers with a vetted network of lenders offering SBA loans, term loans, lines of credit, equipment financing, invoice factoring, merchant cash advances, and commercial real estate loans.

itemListElement.name: SBA Loans
itemListElement.description: SBA 7(a) and 504 loan programs for small businesses

itemListElement.name: Term Loans
itemListElement.description: Short-term and long-term business term loans

itemListElement.name: Business Lines of Credit
itemListElement.description: Flexible revolving lines of credit for small businesses

itemListElement.name: Equipment Financing
itemListElement.description: Loans and leases for business equipment purchases

itemListElement.name: Invoice Factoring
itemListElement.description: Convert outstanding invoices into immediate working capital

itemListElement.name: Merchant Cash Advance
itemListElement.description: Revenue-based financing repaid through future sales

itemListElement.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
itemListElement.description: Financing for purchasing or refinancing commercial property
